sections.heading: Concept
sections.content:
INTEGRATION: Is defined as the anti-differentiation or is the process from the derivative form to the anti-derivative form.
Y = + c, where a is the coefficient of x. n is the power of x and c is the constant value through differentiation.
NOTE: when integrating = ln x + c.

STANDARD INTEGRAL FORMS:
= G(x) + c

sections.heading: Examples and Practice
sections.content:
EXAMPLE
= 3- x + 5, find y?
SOLUTION
Y = + c. y = + c
Y = 7+ + c = + 5x + c.

EXAMPLE
SOLUTION
= + C
= + C + C
